/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o app   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_date_time.dylib
